expertise.summary: Data Science and Machine Learning with expertise in SQL and python for analysis and web development.

responsibilities: Built Tableau dashboard to visualize core business KPIs (e.g. Monthly Recurring Revenue)
Aggregated unstructured data from 20+ sources to build the foundation of a new product; led to $100,000 in new revenue
Designed the data pipeline architecture in team of 5 for a new product that scaled from 0 to 100,000 daily active users
Led the transition to a paperless practice by implementing an electronic booking system and faster, safer and more accurate

Analyzed data from 25,000 monthly active users and used outputs to guide marketing and product strategies; increased average app engagement time by 2x, decreased drop off rate by 30%, and 3x shares on social media
